title: Homework2 - Rehydrating and resuspending primers in solution
author: Hieu Nguyen

steps_raw.instruction: Place dried primer into vile/tube if it is not already in it
Place vile/tube with dried primer into the centrifuge
For each nmol of primer, add 10 µL, of water to make the stock solution
Take 10 µL, of stock concentration and mix it with 90 µL, of buffer
Stop the centrifuge and carefully take out the vile/tube without mixing up the primer
Store away the Stock Solution for later use
Record the nmol of the primer from the documentation
